description_long: This is a large geodesic dome tent with a semi-spherical structure, supported by a network of intersecting metal or composite poles forming triangular panels. The tent is covered with a translucent or opaque fabric material, likely weather-resistant, that stretches tightly over the frame. The entrance is a single arched opening at ground level, large enough for a person to walk through comfortably. The tent sits on a flat, dark base, and its spacious interior is implied by the scale of the human figure standing nearby. The geometric framework is visible through the fabric, giving the tent a modern, architectural appearance. No visible branding or decorative elements are present on the exterior.
description: A large geodesic dome tent with a triangular pole framework and a single arched entrance, covered in a light-colored fabric. The structure is spacious and modern, suitable for urban parks or event spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entrance and a human figure for scale.
description_view_1: Side view with the entrance partially visible and the geometric pole structure prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible entrance, highlighting the continuous dome surface and pole network.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the entrance centered and a human figure standing to the right.
attribute_entrance_type: arched flap entrance located at ground level on one side, no visible zipper or mesh, wide enough for easy access
attribute_guy_line_configuration: No visible guy lines; the structure appears self-supporting with a rigid geodesic frame.
